title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules and six moves for successfully building projects with Claude Code, based on Y Combinator CEO Gary Tan's framework. The guidance covers what to build versus what to avoid, and includes a four-question test for evaluating new projects before starting.
